[ About Me ]
statusopen to work
locationBarcelona, ES
timezoneCET / UTC+1
focusAI, data engineering and governance

I'm a 22-year-old Data Engineer building systems that move and process information at scale.

Diving deep into AI, Data Governance, real-time stream processing, and the intersection of data engineering and machine learning.

When I'm not building pipelines, I'm contributing to personal/open-source projects, exploring the latest news and papers on AI or grinding the ladder in the most competitive videogames out there.

data as a product, not a byproduct automation is the ultimate form of laziness and the highest form of efficiency elegant complexity build to learn (and for the 3 AM incident) the ethics of information AI is the engine, clean data is the fuel

[ Projects ]

Selected Work

Featured · 001
ETL Pipeline for Commercial Prospecting
Bachelor's thesis. End-to-end ETL system consolidating prospecting data from multiple sources with data quality cleansing, normalization, and centralized repository loading.
Python Microsoft VBA ETL Data Quality Data Processing

Designed and implemented a full ETL pipeline that consolidates commercial prospecting data from heterogeneous sources. Built robust cleansing and normalization routines to ensure data integrity before loading into a centralized CRM system.

sources integrated: 5+ data quality score: 96% boosted data quality by: +28%
View Repository (Ongoing, defending it on June 30th) →
[ Classified ]
002
Business Image Classifier
Multimodal deep learning system that classifies business images into 28 categories — combining visual features and OCR-derived text signals.
PyTorch TensorFlow Computer Vision

Trained a multimodal CNN architecture to classify business images across 28 classes. Key finding: text presence in images significantly boosts prediction accuracy — validated through systematic hypothesis testing across data splits. Tracked with W&B.

classes: 28 modalities: image + text
View Repository →
003
Relational Data Analysis System
End-to-end database system with schema design, query optimization, and data processing. 100k+ records, 44% query time reduction.
SQL Python PostgreSQL

Designed a normalized relational schema, implemented optimized queries and indexing strategies resulting in a 44% reduction in query execution time across 100k+ records.

records: 100k+ query speedup: 44%
[ Classified ]
004
Population Growth Analysis
Exploratory analysis of global population trends using UN data — cleaning, correlation analysis, and animated visualizations across 200+ regions.
R ggplot2 Plotly Data Viz

Full data pipeline in R: raw UN population CSV ingestion, tidyverse-based cleaning, correlation matrix generation, and animated/interactive plots via gganimate and Plotly. Covers birth/death differentials and total population trends across 200+ regions.

regions: 200+ stack: R / Shiny

Universitat Autónoma de Barcelona
Bachelor of Science - Data Engineering
2021 — Expected July 2026
  • Engineered an end-to-end sentiment analysis framework evaluating SVM, Random Forest, and Naive Bayes models; optimized performance to an 90% F1-score through rigorous hyperparameter tuning and cross-validation.
  • Developed a comprehensive ML evaluation suite to analyze Precision-Recall trade-offs and Confusion Matrices, ensuring model robustness against imbalanced linguistic datasets.

  • Developed a high-frequency backtesting engine using Cython for core computation, achieving a 50x speedup over pure Python for complex matrix operations.
  • Optimized memory-intensive Graph Theory algorithms for social network analysis, reducing computational complexity from O(n^2) to O(n log n)
